channel.title: aesgcm on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in aesgcm on IT notes

item.title: Webcrypto and Go
item.description: Encrypt on client side using javascript WebCrypto and decrypt on backend using go: javascript code: async function aesGcmEncrypt(plaintext, password) { const pwUtf8 = new TextEncoder().encode(password); // encode password as UTF-8 const pwHash = await crypto.subtle.digest('SHA-256', pwUtf8); // hash the password const iv = crypto.getRandomValues(new Uint8Array(12)); // get 96-bit random iv const alg = { name: 'AES-GCM', iv: iv }; // specify algorithm to use const key = await crypto.
